anchor_status: @deprecated BL-NPD-02 (legacy R&D pipeline) — translated to the production Stage-Gate model; SplitView region is the canonical detail-view pattern.

mapping.production: CSS grid xl:grid-cols-[1fr_380px] gap-4 (no ResizablePanelGroup primitive in @monopilot/ui; prototype split is itself a static grid)
left compact selection list: shadcn Table, role=listbox/region, selected row bg-blue-50 + aria-selected
URL ?selected=<projectId> (shareable) via router.replace + useSearchParams; default = first project
ProjectDetailPanel <aside role=region> lg:sticky lg:top-16, shadcn Card
CardHeader: font-mono code + CardTitle + shadcn Badge (prio→variant, text-paired)
dl grid-cols-2: Type/Owner/Gate/Target launch (Stage→Gate G0..Launched; cost/margin not on merged ProjectSummary → replaced by Recent activity)
mapping.deviation: cost/margin fields absent from production ProjectSummary; "Stage" legacy model → Stage-Gate "Gate"

mapping.production: folded into "Recent activity" section (getProject approvalsTimeline source; empty-feed placeholder in this slice)
mapping.deviation: notes → Recent activity feed (richer, real-data backed)

mapping.production: ArrowUp/ArrowDown move active row, Enter/Space commit ?selected= (a11y + task contract)
mapping.deviation: added keyboard navigation per task T-129 acceptance criterion 2

mapping.production: < 1280 px → matchMedia drops the detail aside, degrades to the selection list (§17.12 breakpoint)

shadcn_translation.window.NPD_PROJECTS: listProjects() → ProjectSummary (REAL Supabase via withOrgContext, supplied by parent RSC)
